summary: Frontend-only testing of 3 newly implemented features: Footer redesign (3-column), CaseStudiesSection defaults (Marina open, Tanja footnote), ProcessSection mobile CSS fix. All 10 specified test scenarios pass.
action_items: Minor: CtaButton does not forward custom data-testid props (renders 'cta-button-primary' always). Header.jsx passes data-testid='mobile-cta-button' but it is ignored. Functionality works correctly — testability-only concern.
critical_code_review_comments: CtaButton.jsx hardcodes data-testid='cta-button-primary' and does not accept or forward a custom data-testid prop. Header passes data-testid='mobile-cta-button' to CtaButton but it is silently dropped. Should add ...rest spread to CtaButton to support custom data-testid overrides.

ProcessSection mobile fix: 'overflow-hidden' on the step div (mobile) correctly clips the background number (9rem/144px, top:-20px). Steps stack vertically with no overlap confirmed at 390px viewport.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 verified: (1) Footer 3-column layout (Navigation/Rechtliches/Folgen) with all correct links and correct URLs. (2) Footer bottom bar: 'Benjamin Kurtz Academy LLC' (copyright) + 'Grounded Spirituality Aligned with Your Purpose' (tagline). (3) CaseStudiesSection: Marina (index 0) auto-opens via useState(0) — content height 388px on load. (4) Clicking Tanja closes Marina (0px) and opens Tanja (484px). (5) Tanja footnote '* Namen wurde geändert' appears only inside Tanja's accordion content (item.name.includes('*') logic). (6) No section-wide footnote at the bottom of the cases section. (7) ProcessSection mobile: .process-bg-number CSS renders at 144px (9rem) with top:-20px at 390px viewport — not overlapping. Steps stack vertically. (8) Mobile header: 'INTRO CALL' button (cta-button-primary, in md:hidden div) visible alongside burger menu toggle.

features_tested.footer_3_columns_navigation: PASS - Navigation heading + 5 nav links (Was ist das?, Fur wen?, Uber Benjamin, Ablauf, Erfahrungen)
features_tested.footer_3_columns_rechtliches: PASS - Rechtliches heading + Terms, Privacy, Imprint, Academy Home links
features_tested.footer_3_columns_folgen: PASS - Folgen heading + Instagram, Spotify, Apple Podcasts, YouTube links
features_tested.footer_bottom_tagline: PASS - 'Grounded Spirituality Aligned with Your Purpose'
features_tested.cases_marina_default_open: PASS - content height 388px on page load (useState(0))
features_tested.cases_tanja_footnote_in_tanja_only: PASS - '* Namen wurde geandert' inside Tanja accordion only
features_tested.cases_no_section_footnote: PASS - no footnote outside accordion wrappers
features_tested.process_mobile_no_overlap: PASS - 3 steps stacked vertically, no overlap
features_tested.mobile_header_intro_call_button: PASS - 'INTRO CALL' visible in md:hidden flex container
features_tested.page_loads_no_js_errors: PASS - no JS page errors on load
